H7600.strongs_def: secure; in a bad sense, haughty
H7600.kjv_def: that is at ease, quiet, tumult. Compare H7946 (שַׁלְאֲנָן).

H7602.strongs_def: to inhale eagerly; figuratively, to cover; by implication, to be angry; also to hasten
H7602.kjv_def: desire (earnestly), devour, haste, pant, snuff up, swallow up.

H7603.strongs_def: barm or yeast-cake (as swelling by fermentation)

H7604.strongs_def: properly, to swell up, i.e. be (causatively, make) redundant
H7604.kjv_def: leave, (be) left, let, remain, remnant, reserve, the rest.

H7607.strongs_def: flesh (as swelling out), as living or forfood; generally food of any kind; figuratively, kindred by blood
H7607.kjv_def: body, flesh, food, (near) kin(-sman, -swoman), near (nigh) (of kin).
H7607.usage: flesh(7x), food(1x), near(1x), nigh(1x), kin(1x), body(1x), kinsman(1x)

H7610.derivation: from H7605 (שְׁאָר) and H7725 (שׁוּב); a remnant will return;
H7610.strongs_def: Shear-Jashub, the symbolic name of one of Isaiah's sons

H7611.strongs_def: a remainder or residual (surviving, final) portion
H7611.kjv_def: that had escaped, be left, posterity, remain(-der), remnant, residue, rest.

H7613.strongs_def: an elevation or leprous scab; figuratively, elation or cheerfulness; exaltation in rank or character
H7613.kjv_def: be accepted, dignity, excellency, highness, raise up self, rising.

H7614.strongs_def: Sheba, the name of three early progenitors of tribes and of an Ethiopian district
H7614.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7615.strongs_def: a Shebaite or descendant of Sheba

H7616.derivation: from an unused root meaning to break up;

H7617.kjv_def: (bring away, carry, carry away, lead, lead away, take) captive(-s), drive (take) away.

H7618.derivation: from an unused root (probably identical with that of H7617 (שָׁבָה) through the idea of subdivision into flashes or streamers (compare H7632 (שָׁבִיב)) meaning to flame;
H7618.strongs_def: a gem (from its sparkle), probably the agate

H7619.derivation: or שׁוּבָאֵל; from H7617 (שָׁבָה) (abbreviated form) or H7725 (שׁוּב) and H410 (אֵל); captive (or returned) of God;
H7619.strongs_def: Shebuel or Shubael, the name of two Israelites

H7620.derivation: or שָׁבֻעַ; also (feminine) שְׁבֻעָה; properly, passive participle of H7650 (שָׁבַע) as a denominative of H7651 (שֶׁבַע);
H7620.strongs_def: literally, sevened, i.e. a week (specifically, of years)

H7621.strongs_def: properly, something sworn, i.e. an oath

H7622.strongs_def: exile, concretely, prisoners; figuratively, a former state of prosperity

H7623.strongs_def: properly, to address in aloud tone, i.e. (specifically) loud; figuratively, to pacify (as if by words)
H7623.kjv_def: commend, glory, keep in, praise, still, triumph.

H7626.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to branch off;
H7626.strongs_def: a scion, i.e. (literally) a stick (for punishing, writing, fighting, ruling, walking, etc.) or (figuratively) a clan
H7626.kjv_def: [idiom] correction, dart, rod, sceptre, staff, tribe.

H7628.strongs_def: exiled; captured; as noun, exile (abstractly or concretely and collectively); by extension, booty
H7628.kjv_def: captive(-ity), prisoners, [idiom] take away, that was taken.

H7634.derivation: feminine of the same as H7629 (שֹׁבִי); captivation;

H7635.strongs_def: a track or passage-way (as if flowing along)

H7636.derivation: from an unused root meaning to interweave;

H7638.derivation: from an unused root meaning to intwine;
H7638.strongs_def: a netting (ornament to the capital of a column)

H7639.strongs_def: a net-work, i.e. (in hunting) a snare, (in architecture) a ballustrade; also a reticulated ornament to apillar

H7640.derivation: from an unused root meaning to flow;
H7640.strongs_def: a lady's train (as trailing after her)

H7641.derivation: or (feminine) שִׁבֹּלֶת; from the same as H7640 (שֹׁבֶל);
H7641.strongs_def: a stream (as flowing); also an ear of grain (as growing out); by analogy, a branch
H7641.kjv_def: branch, channel, ear (of corn), (water-)flood, Shibboleth. Compare H5451 (סִבֹּלֶת).

H7642.strongs_def: a snail (as if floating in its own slime)

H7643.derivation: or (feminine) שִׂבְמָה; probably from H1313 (בָּשָׂם); spice;
H7643.strongs_def: Sebam or Sibmah, a place in Moab

H7644.derivation: or שֶׁבְנָה; from an unused root meaning to grow; growth;

H7645.derivation: or שְׁבַנְיָהוּ; from the same as H7644 (שֶׁבְנָא) and H3050 (יָהּ); Jah has grown (i.e. prospered);
H7645.strongs_def: Shebanjah, the name of three or four Israelites

H7646.strongs_def: to sate, i.e. fill to satisfaction (literally or figuratively)
H7646.kjv_def: have enough, fill (full, self, with), be (to the) full (of), have plenty of, be satiate, satisfy (with), suffice, be weary of.
H7646.usage: satisfy(47x), fill(25x), full(15x), plenty(2x), enough(2x), satiate(1x), sufficed(1x), unsatiable(1x), weary(1x)

H7649.strongs_def: satiated (in a pleasant or disagreeable sense)

H7650.derivation: a primitive root; properly to be complete, but used only as a denominative from H7651 (שֶׁבַע);
H7650.strongs_def: to seven oneself, i.e. swear (as if by repeating a declaration seven times)
H7650.kjv_def: adjure, charge (by an oath, with an oath), feed to the full (by mistake for H7646 (שָׂבַע)), take an oath, [idiom] straitly, (cause to, make to) swear.

H7651.derivation: or (masculine) (שִׁבְעָה); from H7650 (שָׁבַע); a primitive cardinal number;
H7651.strongs_def: seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number

H7652.strongs_def: Sheba, the name of a place in Palestine, and of two Israelites
H7652.pos: proper locative noun, proper masculine noun

H7654.kjv_def: (to have) enough, [idiom] till...be full, (un-) satiable, satisfy, [idiom] sufficiently.

H7655.strongs_def: {seven (as the sacred full one); also (adverbially) seven times; by implication, a week; by extension, an indefinite number}

H7658.derivation: prolonged for the masculine of H7651 (שֶׁבַע);

H7660.strongs_def: to interweave (colored) threads in squares; by implication (of reticulation) to inchase gems in gold

H7662.derivation: (Aramaic) corresponding to the root of H7733 (שׁוֹבֵק);
H7662.strongs_def: to quit, i.e. allow to remain

H7663.strongs_def: to scrutinize; by implication (of watching) to expect (with hope and patience)

H7665.kjv_def: break (down, off, in pieces, up), broken (-hearted), bring to the birth, crush, destroy, hurt, quench, [idiom] quite, tear, view (by mistake for H7663 (שָׂבַר)).
H7665.usage: break(115x), destroy(9x), hurt(3x), torn(2x), crush(1x), quench(1x)

H7667.strongs_def: a fracture, figuratively, ruin; specifically, a solution (of a dream)
H7667.kjv_def: affliction, breach, breaking, broken(-footed, -handed), bruise, crashing, destruction, hurt, interpretation, vexation.
H7667.usage: destruction(21x), breach(7x), hurt(4x), breaking(3x), affliction(2x), bruise(2x), crashing(1x), interpretation(1x), vexation(1x)

H7670.strongs_def: rupture, i.e. a pang; figuratively, ruin

H7673.strongs_def: to repose, i.e. desist from exertion; used in many implied relations (causative, figurative or specific)
H7673.kjv_def: (cause to, let, make to) cease, celebrate, cause (make) to fail, keep (sabbath), suffer to be lacking, leave, put away (down), (make to) rest, rid, still, take away.

H7674.kjv_def: cease, sit still, loss of time.

H7675.strongs_def: properly, session; but used also concretely, an abode or locality

H7678.strongs_def: Shabbethai, the name of three Israelites

H7679.strongs_def: to grow, i.e. (causatively) to enlarge, (figuratively) laud

H7682.strongs_def: to be (causatively, make) lofty, especially inaccessible; by implication, safe, strong; used literally and figuratively
H7682.kjv_def: defend, exalt, be excellent, (be, set on) high, lofty, be safe, set up (on high), be too strong.

H7683.strongs_def: to stray, i.e. (figuratively) sin (with more or less apology)
H7683.kjv_def: [idiom] also for that, deceived, err, go astray, sin ignorantly.

H7686.strongs_def: to stray (causatively, mislead), usually (figuratively) to mistake, especially (morally) to transgress; by extension (through the idea of intoxication) to reel, (figuratively) be enraptured
H7686.kjv_def: (cause to) go astray, deceive, err, be ravished, sin through ignorance, (let, make to) wander.

H7687.strongs_def: Segub, the name of two Israelites

H7688.strongs_def: to peep, i.e. glance sharply at

H7690.strongs_def: large (in size, quantity or number, also adverbial)
H7690.kjv_def: exceeding, great(-ly); many, much, sore, very.
H7690.usage: much(4x), great(3x), many(2x), greatly(1x), very(1x), exceeding(1x), sore(1x)

H7692.strongs_def: properly, aberration, i.e. (technically) a dithyramb or rambling poem

H7698.derivation: from an unused root probably meaning to eject;

H7699.derivation: or שֹׁד; probably from H7736 (שׁוּד) (in its original sense) contracted;
H7699.strongs_def: the breast of a woman or animal (as bulging)
